post.message: Could we schedule a meeting next week to discuss the training needs for our new digital platform? I think it's essential for our team to be well-versed with it.
We've been getting positive feedback about the new patient portal. It seems to be making a big difference in user experience.
Sure, Jane. I'll coordinate with my team and get back to you on the feasible dates and times.
John, that's great to hear. Could you prepare a brief report on the feedback so we can share it with the rest of the team?
Thanks, Rachel. Let's ensure that we prepare a comprehensive plan for the training.

Hello team, I've finalized the requirements for our Customer Service Representatives as discussed in our last meeting. As of Q3 2025, we will require all CSRs to have completed high school, have prior customer service experience, and complete a Healthcare Customer Service Certificate within their first 6 months in the role. We believe these qualifications will equip our staff to provide top-notch service to our patients and ensure we remain compliant with industry standards. Please update your hiring practices accordingly.

Thanks for the update, Rachel. I'll ensure the HR team is aware of these requirements and incorporate them into our hiring process moving forward. The Healthcare Customer Service Certificate is a great addition, it'll help ensure our CSRs are well-equipped to handle healthcare-specific queries.
